input_dict.question: Which artist did Anthony Toby "Tony" Hiller appear with that liked showering himself (and others) with confetti?
input_dict.source_summary: Tony Hiller (The Hiller Brothers) appeared with Rip Taylor, who was known for showering himself (and others) with confetti. This is corroborated by Tony Hiller's page listing Rip Taylor among artists they appeared with (passage [1]).
input_dict.target_summary: Tony Hiller (of The Hiller Brothers) is documented as having appeared with many artists of the time, including Rip Taylor (Tony Hiller page lists Rip Taylor among artists they appeared with). Independent material notes that Rip Taylor was known for his exuberance, including his habit of showering himself (and others) with confetti. These two facts together link Tony Hiller's performances to an artist (Rip Taylor) who had the confetti habit.
input_dict.candidate_summary: Tony Hiller (The Hiller Brothers) appeared with Rip Taylor, who was known for showering himself (and others) with confetti.
